title: licania stricta
intro: Licania stricta, also known as the 'Tamboril' or 'Tamboril tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are derived from its bark and leaves. The health benefits of Licania stricta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to manage diabetes and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Licania stricta may include infusions of the leaves and bark, which can be used to create teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
